column1: # Partition table for LILYGO T-SIM7080G-S3 N16R8 (16 MB flash
# Replaces the arduino-esp32 default 4 MB layout. Reclaims the 12 MB of
# physical flash that the default config does not address.
#   - nvs       20 KB     device cert + WiFi creds + sensor calibration
#   - otadata    8 KB     OTA boot selector (must be 0x2000)
# Factory rescue partition intentionally omitted from this stage - tracked
# as a separate follow-up so the size-check doesn't gate the headline
# expansion on factory_slot >= largest app image.
